scripts.db:migrate: cd apps\api && node_modules\.bin\prisma.exe migrate deploy --schema prisma\schema.prisma
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "turbo run dev --filter=@railcross/web --filter=@railcross/api" "cd apps/worker-ai && python -m src.main"
scripts.setup:app: bun install && bun run dev:services && bun run db:migrate
